HGSS.476.0000:
Vermilion Port is Kanto’s
seaside gateway.\f
Luxury liners from around the world
dock here.
HGSS.476.0001:
My Pokémon is preparing the land
for construction.\f
But I have no money to start
the project.
HGSS.476.0003:
There are eight Gyms in Kanto.\f
That big building is Vermilion’s
Pokémon Gym.
HGSS.476.0004:
Skilled Trainers gather in Kanto.
Gym Leaders are especially strong.\f
They won’t be easy to defeat.
HGSS.476.0005:
You’ve started to collect Kanto
Gym Badges?\f
Don’t you agree that the Trainers
here are tough?
HGSS.476.0006:
I guess you’ll be finished with your
conquest of Kanto Gyms soon.\f
Let me know if you get all
eight Badges.
HGSS.476.0007:
Congratulations!
You got all the Kanto Gym Badges.\f
I’ve got a reward for your efforts.\f
HGSS.476.0008:
PP Max is a powerful item that
raises a move’s top PP to its maximum.\r
It can change the way you battle!
HGSS.476.0009:
PP Max is a powerful item that
raises a move’s top PP to its maximum.\r
It can change the way you battle!
HGSS.476.0010:
Vermilion City
The Port of Exquisite Sunsets
HGSS.476.0011:
Vermilion City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Lt. Surge\r
The Lightning American
HGSS.476.0012:
Pokémon Fan Club
All Pokémon Fans Welcome!
HGSS.476.0014:
Eusine: That was so close!
I thought I could corner it by\r
ambushing it here...\f
But running on the water...
is beyond me.\f
Still, I am starting to see a pattern.\r
SUICUNE prefers water!\r
That means...\f
HGSS.476.0016:
Hi!
My name is Steven.\r
The Champion from the Hoenn region.\f
Have we met...before?\f
That’s not possible.
All the Trainers I have battled\r
seem to have the same look, anyway.\f
Especially the ones who gave me
tough battles...\f
HGSS.476.0017:
Steven: By the way, have you heard of
a Pokémon called LATIAS?\f
I am investigating why LATIAS,
a Pokémon from Hoenn, decided to\r
leave Hoenn to come here.\f
HGSS.476.0018:
Steven: By the way, have you heard of
a Pokémon called LATIOS?\f
I am investigating why LATIOS,
a Pokémon from Hoenn, decided to\r
leave Hoenn to come here.\f
HGSS.476.0019:
LATIAS is a Pokémon that has a lot
to do with Soul Dew, a gemlike Orb.\f
Considering the fact that LATIAS is now
in Kanto, it is possible to assume that\r
this has to do with the Soul Dew.\f
HGSS.476.0020:
LATIOS is a Pokémon that has a lot
to do with Soul Dew, a gemlike Orb.\f
Considering the fact that LATIOS is now
in Kanto, it is possible to assume that\r
this has to do with Soul Dew.\f
HGSS.476.0021:
LATIAS is a Pokémon that travels
a great distance.\f
It’ll be difficult to find without any
machine to track it with.\f
But any Trainer will be drawn to it,
won’t they?\f
HGSS.476.0022:
LATIOS is a Pokémon that travels
a great distance.\f
It’ll be difficult to find without any
machine to track it with.\f
But any Trainer will be drawn to it,
won’t they?\f
HGSS.476.0023:
Steven: I must go.
May our journeys cross again.\f
